name: Waimea Bay
tagline: Birthplace of big wave surfing in winter, glass-calm swimming hole in summer — two completely different worlds.
parking: Parking fills by 10am — arrive early or use Haleiwa shuttle
bestTime: Summer for calm swimming and Jump Rock; winter for watching 30+ ft waves (do NOT swim)
talkStory: Jump Rock is the big flat rock on the left side — locals line up to leap off in summer. In winter the bay transforms completely with massive waves; even wading is deadly. Check surf report before going in any season. Across the street is Waimea Valley for a waterfall hike combo day.
